Other services include family therapy, individual therapy, parenting support, school consultation and support and home-based services. 4105 SE International Way Suite 505 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Varies by site Email (503) 258-4545 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC OUTPATIENT PROGRAM ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assertive Community Treatment (ACT) is an Evidence-Based practice designed to provide comprehensive outpatient treatment and support services, through a wellness and recovery approach to individuals diagnosed with serious mental illness. ACT services are provided by a multidisciplinary team with an aim to maximize independence and community integration. ACT provides a variety of services, delivered within the home and community, as well as office settings to support recovery and reduce or prevent inpatient hospitalization. Services may include skills training, psychiatric prescriber, medication training and support, individual and/or group mental health counseling, case management, peer support, supported employment, and co-occurring substance abuse treatment; all dependent upon individual needs. 3425 13TH Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Services are available to individuals with SPMI who have had a history of multiple psychiatric hospitalizations and/or crisis interventions. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 519-7126 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services.
